TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Bunun, story: bnNr-pear_Laniahu
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.TRANSL: I see there is a tree, and

S.FORM: aiza maza tacini madaingaz tu bunun matatapul mas ai nasi.
S.PHON: aiða maða taʨini madaiŋað tu bunun matatapul~ɬ mas ai naɕi.
S.FORM: aiza maza tacini madaingaz tu bunun matatapul mas ai nasi.
S.PHON: aiða maða taʨini madaiŋað tu bunun matatapul~ɬ mas ai naɕi.
S.TRANSL: There is an old man picking pears.

S.FORM: idadaza sia lukis matatapul mas nasi at.
S.PHON: idadaða ɕia l~ɬukis matatapul~ɬ mas naɕi at.
S.FORM: idadaza sia lukis matatapul mas nasi at.
S.PHON: idadaða ɕia l~ɬukis matatapul~ɬ mas naɕi at.
S.TRANSL: 他一直採樹上的梨子,然後
He is busy plucking pears from on the tree, and then

S.FORM: maza ai sintapul tu nasia hai.
S.PHON: maða ai ɕintapul~ɬ tu naɕia x~χai.
S.FORM: maza ai sintapul tu nasia hai.
S.PHON: maða ai ɕintapul~ɬ tu naɕia x~χai.

S.TRANSL: He takes them and puts them in

S.FORM: mapungadah sia kalalacia mais ai mais ai mais saduan hai ga.
S.PHON: mapuŋadax~χ ɕia kal~ɬal~ɬaʨia mais ai mais ai mais saduan x~χai *a.
S.FORM: mapungadah sia kalalacia mais ai mais ai mais saduan hai ga.
S.PHON: mapuŋadax~χ ɕia kal~ɬal~ɬaʨia mais ai mais ai mais saduan x~χai *a.

S.FORM: naka mavisik sian tu kudamunu i.
S.PHON: naka maviɕik ɕian tu kudamunu i.
S.FORM: naka mavisik sian tu kudamunu i.
S.PHON: naka maviɕik ɕian tu kudamunu i.
S.TRANSL: 然後,他水果應該很多的.
Then he would have had many fruits.
what we are being made to watch.
There are some people over there.
They make them take, aah, no.
'they lead away a goat in passing'

S.FORM: nii tu haiapun tu sintukua sain tu imi hai.
S.PHON: nii tu x~χaiapun tu ɕintukua sain tu imi x~χai.
S.FORM: nii tu haiapun tu sintukua sain tu imi hai.
S.PHON: nii tu x~χaiapun tu ɕintukua sain tu imi x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 不知道這個是什麼意思.
I don't know what is the meaning of this.

S.FORM: mais ai mais isk mais iliskinunta hai.
S.PHON: mais ai mais isk mais il~ɬiskinunta x~χai.
S.FORM: mais ai mais isk mais iliskinunta hai.
S.PHON: mais ai mais isk mais il~ɬiskinunta x~χai.

S.FORM: aiza aiza imita maza aiza mita patasan tupa tu.
S.PHON: aiða aiða imita maða aiða mita patasan tupa tu.
S.FORM: aiza aiza imita maza aiza mita patasan tupa tu.
S.PHON: aiða aiða imita maða aiða mita patasan tupa tu.
S.TRANSL: We have a saying that says:

S.FORM: ai ai mitmang sida mas ai.
S.PHON: ai ai mitmaŋ ɕida mas ai.
S.FORM: ai ai mitmang sida mas ai.
S.PHON: ai ai mitmaŋ ɕida mas ai.

TRANSL.notes: 不要隨便拿走屬於別人,(人)所做的東西.

S.TRANSL: 不要隨便拿走屬於別人, 所做的東西.

TRANSL.notes: Don't casually take stuff belonging to other people, what (people) made.

S.TRANSL: Don't casually take stuff belonging to other people, what made.

S.FORM: ai sia mas luma tu kudamunu.
S.PHON: ai ɕia mas l~ɬuma tu kudamunu.
S.FORM: ai sia mas luma tu kudamunu.
S.PHON: ai ɕia mas l~ɬuma tu kudamunu.

S.FORM: sadu kata mas tacini tu minduduav tu uvaz tu tundaza mas tampu.
S.PHON: sadu kata mas taʨini tu minduduav tu uvað tu tundaða mas tampu.
S.FORM: sadu kata mas tacini tu minduduav tu uvaz tu tundaza mas tampu.
S.PHON: sadu kata mas taʨini tu minduduav tu uvað tu tundaða mas tampu.
S.TRANSL: 我們看到一個年輕人騎單車.
We see a youth riding a bike.

S.FORM: ai nii tu haiapun tu na namapikua bis sain.
S.PHON: ai nii tu x~χaiapun tu na namapikua bis sain.
S.FORM: ai nii tu haiapun tu na namapikua bis sain.
S.PHON: ai nii tu x~χaiapun tu na namapikua bis sain.
S.TRANSL: I don't know what he will do.

W.TRANSL: 非實現=主焦-做什麼-受格-完成貌

S.FORM: mmm nii tu haiapun tu mapinkua tu sia.
S.PHON: mmm nii tu x~χaiapun tu mapinkua tu ɕia.
S.FORM: mmm nii tu haiapun tu mapinkua tu sia.
S.PHON: mmm nii tu x~χaiapun tu mapinkua tu ɕia.
S.TRANSL: I don't know what he's doing.
Then, what do we see him do?

W.TRANSL: 非實現=主焦-做什麼-受格-完成貌
非實現=主焦-做什麼-改變狀態

S.FORM: sadu tu aiza maza inastucia maza tas tu kalala sin sintatapul madaingazcia tu nasian at ka supah at.
S.PHON: sadu tu aiða maða inastuʨia maða tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬa ɕin ɕintatapul~ɬ madaiŋaðʨia tu naɕian at ka supax~χ at.
S.FORM: sadu tu aiza maza inastucia maza tas tu kalala sin sintatapul madaingazcia tu nasian at ka supah at.
S.PHON: sadu tu aiða maða inastuʨia maða tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬa ɕin ɕintatapul~ɬ madaiŋaðʨia tu naɕian at ka supax~χ at.
S.TRANSL: 看得到,地上有一個籃子,老人所採滿的,梨子很多啊.
You can see, on the ground there is a basket, that the old man filled by plucking a lot of pears.

W.TRANSL: 工焦<完成貌><重疊>採下來

S.FORM: ai ai (h)ai masivit tu madaingazcia sadu at maza madaingaz hai nii tu haiap nii tu sadu aubaka ka ai malmananu saia matatapul nasicia.
S.PHON: ai ai (x~χ)ai maɕivit tu madaiŋaðʨia sadu at maða madaiŋað x~χai nii tu x~χaiap nii tu sadu aubaka ka ai mal~ɬmananu saia matatapul~ɬ naɕiʨia.
S.FORM: ai ai (h)ai masivit tu madaingazcia sadu at maza madaingaz hai nii tu haiap nii tu sadu aubaka ka ai malmananu saia matatapul nasicia.
S.PHON: ai ai (x~χ)ai maɕivit tu madaiŋaðʨia sadu at maða madaiŋað x~χai nii tu x~χaiap nii tu sadu aubaka ka ai mal~ɬmananu saia matatapul~ɬ naɕiʨia.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人觀察,他看得到嗎,他不知道,看不到,努力採下那些梨子.
That old man, looks at it, does he see it? He doesn't know, doesn't see it because, uhm, he tries very hard to pick those pears.

S.FORM: ai ka ungadahan mas makuangkuang tu iniliskinan at.
S.PHON: ai ka uŋadax~χan mas makuaŋkuaŋ tu inil~ɬiskinan at.
S.FORM: ai ka ungadahan mas makuangkuang tu iniliskinan at.
S.PHON: ai ka uŋadax~χan mas makuaŋkuaŋ tu inil~ɬiskinan at.

S.TRANSL: 那些下朋友,起了壞的念頭,偷走一籃梨子.
Those children, with their bad intentions, steal a basket of the pears.

S.FORM: ai tuza sian tu uvaz tu mais iliskinunmita hai hai nii tu haiapun tu at nasa nasaduanta amukai simabin sian tu uvaz tu (ma)viaz tu tanhaiiu.
S.PHON: ai tuða ɕian tu uvað tu mais il~ɬiskinunmita x~χai x~χai nii tu x~χaiapun tu at nasa nasaduanta amukai ɕimabin ɕian tu uvað tu (ma)viað tu tanx~χaiiu.
S.FORM: ai tuza sian tu uvaz tu mais iliskinunmita hai hai nii tu haiapun tu at nasa nasaduanta amukai simabin sian tu uvaz tu (ma)viaz tu tanhaiiu.
S.PHON: ai tuða ɕian tu uvað tu mais il~ɬiskinunmita x~χai x~χai nii tu x~χaiapun tu at nasa nasaduanta amukai ɕimabin ɕian tu uvað tu (ma)viað tu tanx~χaiiu.
S.TRANSL: 真的,這些孩子,當我們思考一下,我們不知道這些孩子是誰,為何偷?

TRANSL.notes: Really, if we think about it, we don't know, who are these children (and) what what for do they steal?

S.TRANSL: Really, if we think about it, we don't know, who are these children what what for do they steal?

S.FORM: mm at ooh aiza tasa pingaza ai napunahtungas andii tu na mabananaz tu.
S.PHON: mm at **x~χ aiða tasa piŋaða ai napunax~χtuŋas andii tu na mabananað tu.
S.FORM: mm at ooh aiza tasa pingaza ai napunahtungas andii tu na mabananaz tu.
S.PHON: mm at **x~χ aiða tasa piŋaða ai napunax~χtuŋas andii tu na mabananað tu.
S.TRANSL: 就有一個女生,要碰面那個男生那邊了.
Then, there is a girl who will met the boy over there.

S.FORM: ai pahasian pahasia mais sadu kata tu ai mais tanhaiiu muliva hai.
S.PHON: ai pax~χaɕian pax~χaɕia mais sadu kata tu ai mais tanx~χaiiu mul~ɬiva x~χai.
S.FORM: ai pahasian pahasia mais sadu kata tu ai mais tanhaiiu muliva hai.
S.PHON: ai pax~χaɕian pax~χaɕia mais sadu kata tu ai mais tanx~χaiiu mul~ɬiva x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 所以,我們看那個的話,嗯,如果他偷著犯錯
So if we see that, uhm, if he makes a mistake by stealing

S.FORM: nau tu ai aiza maza aiza maza sadu pahasia maza sian isiadaan hai.
S.PHON: nau tu ai aiða maða aiða maða sadu pax~χaɕia maða ɕian iɕiadaan x~χai.
S.FORM: nau tu ai aiza maza aiza maza sadu pahasia maza sian isiadaan hai.
S.PHON: nau tu ai aiða maða aiða maða sadu pax~χaɕia maða ɕian iɕiadaan x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 當然,路上有人,有人看到

TRANSL.notes: Of course, there is a, there is someone seeing (it) so that is on the road

S.TRANSL: Of course, there is a, there is someone seeing so that is on the road

S.FORM: kat ai sias ai maza sangan ooh maza sangandii pingaz tu maza uvaza hai saia hai ka sin(tupa ana maz(d)ang sindailaz tu.
S.PHON: kat ai ɕias ai maða saŋan **x~χ maða saŋandii piŋað tu maða uvaða x~χai saia x~χai ka ɕin(tupa ana mað(d)aŋ ɕindail~ɬað tu.
S.FORM: kat ai sias ai maza sangan ooh maza sangandii pingaz tu maza uvaza hai saia hai ka sin(tupa ana maz(d)ang sindailaz tu.
S.PHON: kat ai ɕias ai maða saŋan **x~χ maða saŋandii piŋað tu maða uvaða x~χai saia x~χai ka ɕin(tupa ana mað(d)aŋ ɕindail~ɬað tu.
S.TRANSL: 剛才的那個女生,就是說:"好像是老天安排的".
The girl from just before said: "It looks like it's fate."

S.FORM: at naia hai papunahtungun mazadii bananaza hai.
S.PHON: at naia x~χai papunax~χtuŋun maðadii bananaða x~χai.
S.FORM: at naia hai papunahtungun mazadii bananaza hai.
S.PHON: at naia x~χai papunax~χtuŋun maðadii bananaða x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 他們就碰到那個那邊的男生.
Then they met with that boy there.

S.FORM: nii na saia nahtu mananulu sadu mas daancia ai nii tu haiap tu aiza maza sia batu pan'uni sia batu mutunghaz at.
S.PHON: nii na saia nax~χtu mananul~ɬu sadu mas daanʨia ai nii tu x~χaiap tu aiða maða ɕia batu panʔuni ɕia batu mutuŋx~χað at.
S.FORM: nii na saia nahtu mananulu sadu mas daancia ai nii tu haiap tu aiza maza sia batu pan'uni sia batu mutunghaz at.
S.PHON: nii na saia nax~χtu mananul~ɬu sadu mas daanʨia ai nii tu x~χaiap tu aiða maða ɕia batu panʔuni ɕia batu mutuŋx~χað at.
S.TRANSL: 他沒辦法注意到路,不知道有石頭,就碰到石頭倒下來.
He couldn't watch out for the road, didn't know there was that stone. He hit that stone and fell over.
偷走的梨子就掉下來了.
Then the pears that were stolen all fell.

S.FORM: aiza tu tas tu lumah cina mas dusa maza ai uvaz punahtungan sia daan.
S.PHON: aiða tu tas tu l~ɬumax~χ ʨina mas dusa maða ai uvað punax~χtuŋan ɕia daan.
S.FORM: aiza tu tas tu lumah cina mas dusa maza ai uvaz punahtungan sia daan.
S.PHON: aiða tu tas tu l~ɬumax~χ ʨina mas dusa maða ai uvað punax~χtuŋan ɕia daan.
S.TRANSL: 還好,有一家人,一個媽媽和兩個孩子在路上碰到男生.
But fortunately there is a family, a woman and two children, who meets the boy on the road.

S.FORM: indangaz a saia ai kankan mas minututu tu nasiicia.
S.PHON: indaŋað a saia ai kankan mas minututu tu naɕiiʨia.
S.FORM: indangaz a saia ai kankan mas minututu tu nasiicia.
S.PHON: indaŋað a saia ai kankan mas minututu tu naɕiiʨia.
S.TRANSL: 他們幫助他整理所倒下來的梨子.
They help him arrange the pears that had fallen out.

S.FORM: ungat aupa ai ai aupa kaz pudaanun uvazan at.
S.PHON: uŋat aupa ai ai aupa kað pudaanun uvaðan at.
S.FORM: ungat aupa ai ai aupa kaz pudaanun uvazan at.
S.PHON: uŋat aupa ai ai aupa kað pudaanun uvaðan at.
S.TRANSL: Afterwards, the child was sent on his way.

S.FORM: masa masa masa mudaan saia hai.
S.PHON: masa masa masa mudaan saia x~χai.
S.FORM: masa masa masa mudaan saia hai.
S.PHON: masa masa masa mudaan saia x~χai.

S.FORM: maza itu cinacia dii maza mabananaz tu uvaza hai sadu tu hai maza isaicia tamung hai kaungan at.
S.PHON: maða itu ʨinaʨia dii maða mabananað tu uvaða x~χai sadu tu x~χai maða isaiʨia tamuŋ x~χai kauŋan at.
S.FORM: maza itu cinacia dii maza mabananaz tu uvaza hai sadu tu hai maza isaicia tamung hai kaungan at.
S.PHON: maða itu ʨinaʨia dii maða mabananað tu uvaða x~χai sadu tu x~χai maða isaiʨia tamuŋ x~χai kauŋan at.
S.TRANSL: 可是,當他們走的時候,那個女生看到那個男生丟了他的帽子.
But when they are going, the woman sees that he lost his hat.

S.FORM: ooh at la'laun saicia tu ai "isudii isudii tamungan.
S.PHON: **x~χ at l~ɬaʔl~ɬaun saiʨia tu ai "isudii isudii tamuŋan.
S.FORM: ooh at la'laun saicia tu ai "isudii isudii tamungan.
S.PHON: **x~χ at l~ɬaʔl~ɬaun saiʨia tu ai "isudii isudii tamuŋan.

S.FORM: at aupa masial tu uvaz ai ai suhaisun saicia.
S.PHON: at aupa maɕial~ɬ tu uvað ai ai sux~χaisun saiʨia.
S.FORM: at aupa masial tu uvaz ai ai suhaisun saicia.
S.PHON: at aupa maɕial~ɬ tu uvað ai ai sux~χaisun saiʨia.
S.TRANSL: 然後,好孩子把帽子還給他.
Then the good child gives it back.
"Uhm, can you guys give three of those?"

S.FORM: mahtu saduan tu adii uvazan hai uka(n m)as ham.
S.PHON: max~χtu saduan tu adii uvaðan x~χai uka(n m)as x~χam.
S.FORM: mahtu saduan tu adii uvazan hai uka(n m)as ham.
S.PHON: max~χtu saduan tu adii uvaðan x~χai uka(n m)as x~χam.
S.TRANSL: 看得見那個孩子沒有談心.
It can be seen that that child is not very greedy.

S.FORM: mais saduanta hai mahtu dii uvaza hai makisaiv saia hai.
S.PHON: mais saduanta x~χai max~χtu dii uvaða x~χai makisaiv saia x~χai.
S.FORM: mais saduanta hai mahtu dii uvaza hai makisaiv saia hai.
S.PHON: mais saduanta x~χai max~χtu dii uvaða x~χai makisaiv saia x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 如果我們可以看得見的話,那個孩子可以,[讓]他們要求.
If we were to look at it, that child could, with them asking for it.
因為他們三個人,如果我們看見的話,那個孩子可以幫他們要求拿帽子.
Because the three of them, if we were to look at it, that child could, help them take the hat, if they were asking for it.

S.FORM: masuhais pahasia ai mahtu siaan makisaiv.
S.PHON: masux~χais pax~χaɕia ai max~χtu ɕiaan makisaiv.
S.FORM: masuhais pahasia ai mahtu siaan makisaiv.
S.PHON: masux~χais pax~χaɕia ai max~χtu ɕiaan makisaiv.
S.TRANSL: 還[給他們],所以,嗯,可以要求
give it back so, uh, he can demand

S.FORM: makisaiv sia uvazcia tutau mas ai nasitan.
S.PHON: makisaiv ɕia uvaðʨia tutau mas ai naɕitan.
S.FORM: makisaiv sia uvazcia tutau mas ai nasitan.
S.PHON: makisaiv ɕia uvaðʨia tutau mas ai naɕitan.
S.TRANSL: 因為他還給他們,所以要求那孩子三個梨子.
He gave it back, so he can demand from that child three pears.

S.FORM: at aupa madii madaingaz matatapul nasian hai nadadu si'aminunin at aupa kunastu saia sadu ai (ma)viatu maldadauk kalalaan tu ka ai nii tu matmuz tu.
S.PHON: at aupa madii madaiŋað matatapul~ɬ naɕian x~χai nadadu ɕiʔaminunin at aupa kunastu saia sadu ai (ma)viatu mal~ɬdadauk kal~ɬal~ɬaan tu ka ai nii tu matmuð tu.
S.FORM: at aupa madii madaingaz matatapul nasian hai nadadu si'aminunin at aupa kunastu saia sadu ai (ma)viatu maldadauk kalalaan tu ka ai nii tu matmuz tu.
S.PHON: at aupa madii madaiŋað matatapul~ɬ naɕian x~χai nadadu ɕiʔaminunin at aupa kunastu saia sadu ai (ma)viatu mal~ɬdadauk kal~ɬal~ɬaan tu ka ai nii tu matmuð tu.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人,一直採著例子,也許全部都放在裡面,但看見,為什麼籃子還是沒滿?
That old man, who is plucking pears, taking maybe all of them and putting them in there, sees that, why is the basket still not full?

W.TRANSL: 工焦<完成貌>全部<完成貌>

M.TRANSL: 工焦<完成貌>全部<完成貌>

S.FORM: nii bisia sangan hai dusa aupa maza sintapul matmuza nasi hai.
S.PHON: nii biɕia saŋan x~χai dusa aupa maða ɕintapul~ɬ matmuða naɕi x~χai.
S.FORM: nii bisia sangan hai dusa aupa maza sintapul matmuza nasi hai.
S.PHON: nii biɕia saŋan x~χai dusa aupa maða ɕintapul~ɬ matmuða naɕi x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 不是剛剛那兩個是不是,採滿梨子的
It's not just now the two, isn't it, that they filled it with plucked pears

S.FORM: at at sadu saia mas tantatau daan tu bununtan tu.
S.PHON: at at sadu saia mas tantatau daan tu bununtan tu.
S.FORM: at at sadu saia mas tantatau daan tu bununtan tu.
S.PHON: at at sadu saia mas tantatau daan tu bununtan tu.
S.TRANSL: 然後,他就看得到路上有三個人.
Then he sees three people on the road.
然後他看到路上有三個人,但自己繼續拿著梨子.
Then he sees three people on the road, while he keeps on plucking all pears.

S.FORM: ai tacini hai ka at tasa ka nii amin saia haiap ai ai nadaduan amindii ai.
S.PHON: ai taʨini x~χai ka at tasa ka nii amin saia x~χaiap ai ai nadaduan amindii ai.
S.FORM: ai tacini hai ka at tasa ka nii amin saia haiap ai ai nadaduan amindii ai.
S.PHON: ai taʨini x~χai ka at tasa ka nii amin saia x~χaiap ai ai nadaduan amindii ai.
S.TRANSL: 他不知道,也許他們其中一個人有做了.
He doesn't know, maybe one of them did it.

S.FORM: nadadu amindii matatapul nasi tu madaingaz tu bunun hai istaimangtaimang saia tu hai.
S.PHON: nadadu amindii matatapul~ɬ naɕi tu madaiŋað tu bunun x~χai istaimaŋtaimaŋ saia tu x~χai.
S.FORM: nadadu amindii matatapul nasi tu madaingaz tu bunun hai istaimangtaimang saia tu hai.
S.PHON: nadadu amindii matatapul~ɬ naɕi tu madaiŋað tu bunun x~χai istaimaŋtaimaŋ saia tu x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 也許全部那裡,一直採下梨子的老人,這是怎麼一回事?
Maybe all of them over there, the old man who was plucking pears , what stupid thing is this?!

S.FORM: at pahasia ai andii ha ha ha haninguan hai.
S.PHON: at pax~χaɕia ai andii x~χa x~χa x~χa x~χaniŋuan x~χai.
S.FORM: at pahasia ai andii ha ha ha haninguan hai.
S.PHON: at pax~χaɕia ai andii x~χa x~χa x~χa x~χaniŋuan x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 嗯,那部影- 影- 影- 影片
Uhm, that mo- mo- mo- movie clip
那個,你們給[人]看的影片.
Then that movie clip that you made [people] see.

S.FORM: maza kitngaab hai viatu aiza aiza aiza maza bunun ma'iskus mas sidicia mudadaan saia si si si sintupa tu.
S.PHON: maða kitŋaab x~χai viatu aiða aiða aiða maða bunun maʔiskus mas ɕidiʨia mudadaan saia ɕi ɕi ɕi ɕintupa tu.
S.FORM: maza kitngaab hai viatu aiza aiza aiza maza bunun ma'iskus mas sidicia mudadaan saia si si si sintupa tu.
S.PHON: maða kitŋaab x~χai viatu aiða aiða aiða maða bunun maʔiskus mas ɕidiʨia mudadaan saia ɕi ɕi ɕi ɕintupa tu.
S.TRANSL: 最開始,為什麼有有有那個人,牽著羊,走在路上,所說的?
In the beginning, why is is is there that person, taking the goat, walking on the road, what's been said?

S.FORM: ai ai mabubuklas bununtancia halinga sintupa tu.
S.PHON: ai ai mabubukl~ɬas bununtanʨia x~χal~ɬiŋa ɕintupa tu.
S.FORM: ai ai mabubuklas bununtancia halinga sintupa tu.
S.PHON: ai ai mabubukl~ɬas bununtanʨia x~χal~ɬiŋa ɕintupa tu.
S.TRANSL: 嗯,這是聰明的人說的話
Uhm, how do intelligent people say this?

S.FORM: ai katu tanhaiiu mas itu ai itu bunun tu ai hai haimangsut mazmaazdau.
S.PHON: ai katu tanx~χaiiu mas itu ai itu bunun tu ai x~χai x~χaimaŋsut maðmaaðdau.
S.FORM: ai katu tanhaiiu mas itu ai itu bunun tu ai hai haimangsut mazmaazdau.
S.PHON: ai katu tanx~χaiiu mas itu ai itu bunun tu ai x~χai x~χaimaŋsut maðmaaðdau.
S.TRANSL: 不要偷別人的東西,順手牽羊.
